name: bun-audit
reason: Consolidated into bun-dev. bun-audit was a thin router over the same codex-dev bun engine and its description overlapped bun-dev, causing trigger ambiguity. bun-dev now owns the audit/fix/validate command surface (its Power Tools section) plus the rules and references.
restore: Move this directory back to skills/bun-audit only if a standalone audit-only router is needed again and bun-dev no longer surfaces the codex-dev bun commands.
